name: Marinated Beef Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
Combine marinade ingredients and pour over roast in a shallow bowl. Cover and refrigerate overnight or for 24 hours.
Remove meat from marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat oil in a large skillet and brown meat on all sides.
Place the meat in a slow cooker.
Cover and cook on LOW for 8-10 hours.
Serve with accumulated gravy (optional, thickened with flour and water paste).
